global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a focus on rewards and gameplay.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to install the app for rewards.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the entire background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'PixelForge' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main reward message
elements.description: The headline reads 'Win epic rewards' in large, eye-catching white text, prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: No ads message
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline states 'No ads in first week' in a clean, readable font.

elements.label: Game elements
elements.description: Four circular game elements are arranged in a grid pattern, suggesting an interactive gameplay feature.

elements.label: Gameplay indicator
elements.description: An arrow pointing to the right indicates progression or interaction within the game.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom reads 'Install now' in bold white text against a contrasting background.

elements.label: Gameplay visuals
elements.description: Additional gameplay visuals are displayed in a grid format, enhancing the interactive feel of the ad.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned at the top left adds visual interest to the ad.

elements.label: Gameplay feature
elements.description: A small gameplay feature is positioned at the top right, contributing to the overall interactive theme.

elements.label: Additional gameplay element
elements.description: A small circular element at the center bottom suggests further gameplay interaction.

elements.label: Gameplay detail
elements.description: A small detail element positioned at the center adds depth to the gameplay visuals.

elements.label: Gameplay detail
elements.description: Another small detail element positioned at the center enhances the interactive aspect.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element at the top center adds visual flair to the ad.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Another small decorative element at the top left enhances the overall design.

elements.label: Main reward message
elements.description: The text 'Win epic rewards' is prominently displayed in bold white font, conveying the main offer.
elements.text_content: Win epic rewards No ads in first week

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: The logo 'PixelForge' is displayed in a modern font, emphasizing brand identity.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button at the bottom reads 'Install now' in bold text, encouraging user engagement.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline and body text, with the CTA button at the bottom.
